title: Kawaii Foods
description: Extra foods for Minecraft with a Cute Kawaii Card Collection.
body:
### **_This mod is now only going to be version updated, this mod might be updated by the orginal owner but we have permission to version update._**

![Kawaii Foods Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1dcd0f53195e0df443d0b9439ad770c6366c73a3.png)

### **_This mod is now only going to be version updated, this mod might be updated by the orginal owner but we have permission to version update._**   ![What is this mod?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/508306d934c9093502102d41ff872af317a605b6_0.webp) Kawaii Foods is a new food mod that adds in bunch of new foods that fit in well with the vanilla recipes and food types to give the game a little more variety, from toast to a nice pot of tea. But that's not all, since we wanted our food to fit the vanilla style and didn't want to make all our foods have faces but we still really wanted to make our mod kawaii we added a twist. Each time you eat our food you have a chance to win a collectable card, collectable cards will give you the cute kawaii character that you can keep for your very own, share with your friends or trade your extras with our custom villager trader for nuggets, Iron, Gold and Dimond.   ![What are the recipes for this mod?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62fa8b9532adc8ee23a955c9648e2cb176801fb2_0.webp) We understand some of the users using our mods keep asking where is the recipe, what are the recipes, but a large trend these days is to ask the user to download a recipe mod, I am sorry we are going to do the same here. Please download the mod [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) or a likes the reason we ask this is if we spent all our time screenshotting many recipes when we are working on this project it would mean we wouldn't have time to add new foods, fixing bugs and adding new collectables Please remember we have our own lives to deal with and have more then one mod we have in our portfolio all this takes time, there isn't any point in us reinventing the wheel, there is 13 recipes just for our tea alone so please understand our hard work, it does not take a few moments to include [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) in to your mod pack and is very useful for other mods and recipes including all vanilla recipes.   ![What are the cards for?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46d4087397b1343d204a8a6948b9fca5302a0cee_0.webp) We wanted a way to keep things based on the vanilla styled but also kawaii at the same time, taking a bite out of a smiling cookie for some would be fun but others might feel unconfutable and it wouldn't be very kawaii there for we opted to add a collection card and trading game of our characters what you have a chance of getting while eating one of our kawaii foods. The card collection will grow over time and might also include some vanilla items if we have a kawaii food character that will fit the bill, as of today we have 8 characters there for there is 24 cards to collect, you have your basic, common and rare tiers.   You can collect them all, you can trade with friends and also sell your extras to villages for useful resources like iron, gold and diamond nuggets. The villager trading isn't active just yet in versions before 1.0.6.6. ![What cards are included?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54982179d596abcadaf2ba895f4eb7af92f91f05_0.webp) All New collection card game included inside our mod, all you have to do to get a chance to collect our cards is eat the Kawaii Foods ![Card Collection](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2faf9d3764268452b9689add98a9ec640b0afbb.png) This image will be updated when new characters are added.   ![Can we use this mod in our modpack?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23a8ac037ff46378dd0309a7462e232662f67438_0.webp)  Yes we love the idea of users using our mods in there mod packs, if you want to say thanks you can just leave a link back to this mod page but you don't have to, we just ask you NOT to re-host you must use the modpack via this sites mod loader. You may not re-host this mod in any shape, we don't give anyone permission to re-host our mods part from our team only!     ![Please Note:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bf5d62fe7d8dd1d6b5c07a8205dbc9e85aef404_0.webp) We are working on this mod as we speak and for now please use JEI for recipes. We are updating textures, adding new items to help create the foods and drinks and we are also making recipes for the items are are also trying to balance the mod so it fits better in to Minecraft this might be some foods change or get tweaked to fit the MC world and style.   If you was using the older versions before 1.0.6.x and wonder where the items are, don't worry there just hidden from creative tab, most items will return once they have been updated added recipes and also had there cards created, a few items might be dropped or renamed as we don't want to break any trade or copyright's out there.    ### Supporting The Mods? This will be updated and will point you to original creator and now future creator. Most importantly **ENJOY** yourself. ![Kawaii Foods Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1dcd0f53195e0df443d0b9439ad770c6366c73a3.png)
